title: HSK Levels Explained: From HSK 1 to HSK 6
titleZh: HSK 等级说明：从 HSK 1 到 HSK 6
summary: Understand the six levels of the HSK exam and what each level means for your Chinese proficiency and university application.
summaryZh: 了解 HSK 考试的六个等级及其对应的汉语水平与大学申请要求。
content:
The Hanyu Shuiping Kaoshi (HSK) has six levels. HSK 1–2 focus on basic daily communication; HSK 3–4 are for intermediate learners; HSK 5–6 indicate advanced proficiency. Many Chinese universities require HSK 4 or above for degree programs.

HSK 1–2

Vocabulary: 300 (HSK 1) and 600 (HSK 2) words. Listening and reading only.

HSK 3–4

Vocabulary: 600 (HSK 3) and 1,200 (HSK 4). Required by many universities for undergraduate programs.

HSK 5–6

Vocabulary: 2,500 (HSK 5) and 5,000+ (HSK 6). For graduate programs and scholarship applications.
contentZh:
汉语水平考试（HSK）分为六个等级。HSK 1–2 侧重日常基础交流；HSK 3–4 为中级；HSK 5–6 表示高级水平。许多中国高校要求学位项目申请者达到 HSK 4 及以上。

HSK 1–2

词汇量：300（HSK 1）与 600（HSK 2）。仅考查听力与阅读。

HSK 3–4

词汇量：600（HSK 3）与 1,200（HSK 4）。多数院校本科项目要求。

HSK 5–6

词汇量：2,500（HSK 5）与 5,000+（HSK 6）。研究生项目与奖学金申请常用。
author: Editorial Team

title: HSK Listening: Tips and Practice Strategies
titleZh: HSK 听力：备考技巧与练习方法
summary: Practical tips to improve your HSK listening score: question types, time management, and recommended resources.
summaryZh: 提升 HSK 听力分数的实用技巧：题型、时间分配与推荐资源。
content:
HSK listening tests your ability to understand spoken Mandarin in everyday and academic contexts. This article covers question formats, how to use practice tests, and common pitfalls.

Question Types

Multiple choice based on short dialogues or monologues. Focus on keywords and tone.

Practice

Use official past papers and simulate exam conditions. Build vocabulary in context.
contentZh:
HSK 听力考查在日常与学术场景下理解普通话的能力。本文介绍题型、如何利用真题练习以及常见失分点。

题型

根据短对话或独白做选择题。注意关键词与语气。

练习

使用官方真题并模拟考场。在语境中积累词汇。
author: Editorial Team

title: HSK Reading: Strategies for Speed and Accuracy
titleZh: HSK 阅读：速度与准确率策略
summary: How to tackle HSK reading sections: skimming, vocabulary building, and time allocation.
summaryZh: 如何应对 HSK 阅读部分：略读、词汇积累与时间分配。
content:
Reading is a major part of HSK. Learn to skim for main ideas, recognize common structures, and manage your time across passages.

Skimming

Read questions first, then scan the text for relevant sentences.

Vocabulary

Focus on HSK word lists for your target level. Practice with graded readers.
contentZh:
阅读是 HSK 的重要部分。学会略读抓主旨、识别常见句式并合理分配时间。

略读

先看题目，再扫读定位相关句子。

词汇

针对目标等级熟记 HSK 词汇表，配合分级读物练习。
author: Editorial Team
